---
title: "Clean Non-Personnel"
format: html
---

# Setup

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(glue)
library(janitor)
library(readxl)
library(writexl)
library(arrow)

options(scipen = 12, digits = 12)

path_data <- Sys.getenv("PATH_DATA")
year_fiscal <- Sys.getenv("YEAR_FISCAL")
```

# Import

Cost center categorization.

```{r}
costcenters <-
  read_excel(glue("{path_data}/manual/costcenters_categorization.xlsx")) |>
  select(costcenter_id, is_school)
```

```{r}
# pos_cat_prev <-
#   read_excel(
#     glue("{path_working}/Previous Categorization - PO.xlsx"),
#     col_types = "text"
#   ) |>
#   clean_names() |>
#   mutate(across(po_number, str_squish)) |>
#   distinct(po_number, po_categorization_previous)
#
# grants <-
#   read_excel(
#     glue("{path_working}/Grants good.xlsx"),
#     col_types = c(rep("text", 3), "logical")
#   )
```

Raw non-personnel data.

```{r}
nonpersonnel_ga0 <-
  read_excel(
    glue("{path_data}/raw/r051a_expense_71_GA0_{year_fiscal}.xlsx"),
    range = "A13:AU46857",
    col_types = c(rep("text", 36), rep("numeric", 3), rep("text", 8))
  )

nonpersonnel_gd0 <-
  read_excel(
    glue("{path_data}/raw/r051a_expense_71_GD0_{year_fiscal}.xlsx"),
    range = "A13:AU60710",
    col_types = c(rep("text", 36), rep("numeric", 3), rep("text", 8))
  )

r209 <-
  read_excel(
    glue("{path_data}/raw/r209_GD0_GA0_{year_fiscal}.xlsx"),
    range = "A17:AG3974",
    col_types = "text"
  ) |>
  clean_names() |>
  rename(project_id = project)
```

Purchase order details.

```{r}
po <-
  read_excel(
    glue("{path_data}/raw/r071_2022_2026.xls"),
    range = "A23:AY40447",
    col_types = "text"
  ) |>
  clean_names() |>
  summarize(
    suppliers = str_flatten(
      sort(unique(supplier_name)),
      collapse = "; "
    ),
    items = str_flatten(
      sort(unique(po_line_item_description)),
      collapse = "; "
    ),
    .by = c(po_number, po_title)
  ) |>
  rename(title = po_title)
```

# Tidy and Transform

```{r}
nonpersonnel <-
  bind_rows(nonpersonnel_ga0, nonpersonnel_gd0) |>
  clean_names() |>
  rename(
    agency_id = agency,
    program_id = program, program_name = program_desc,
    costcenter_id = cost_center, costcenter_name = cost_center_desc,
    account_id = account, account_name = account_desc,
    project_id = project, project_name = project_desc,
    award_id = award, award_name = award_desc
  ) |>
  left_join(costcenters, by = join_by(costcenter_id)) |>
  mutate(
    costcenter_id = case_when(
      is_school ~ "SCHOOL",
      costcenter_id %in% c("10001", "10002", "10003", "10040") ~ "OCFO",
      costcenter_id %in% c("40078", "40203") ~ "40078",
      costcenter_id %in% c(
        "40080", "40084", "40130", "40208", "40228", "40229", "40242"
      ) ~ "OTHER DIRECT",
      costcenter_id %in% c("00000", "40223") ~ "OTHER INDIRECT",
      .default = costcenter_id
    ),
    costcenter_name = case_when(
      costcenter_id == "SCHOOL" ~ "SCHOOL",
      costcenter_id == "OCFO" ~ "OFFICE OF THE CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER",
      costcenter_id == "40078" ~ "OFFICE OF OPERATIONS",
      costcenter_id == "OTHER DIRECT" ~ "OTHER DIRECT",
      costcenter_id == "OTHER INDIRECT" ~ "OTHER INDIRECT",
      .default = costcenter_name
    ),
  ) |>
  filter(agency_id == "GA0" | ((project_id %in% r209$project_id))) |>
  filter(net_accounted != 0.00)
```

```{r}
costcenters_nonzero <-
  nonpersonnel |>
  summarize(
    net_accounted = round(sum(net_accounted), 2),
    .by = costcenter_id
  ) |>
  filter(net_accounted != 0.00)

nonpersonnel <-
  nonpersonnel |>
  filter(costcenter_id %in% costcenters_nonzero$costcenter_id)

nonpersonnel |>
  pull(net_accounted) |>
  sum()
```

Account ID's starting with 7131 or 7132, but that are not services.

```{r}
services_excluded <- c(
  "7131002",
  "7131003",
  "7131004",
  "7131007",
  "7131012",
  "7131014",
  "7131015",
  "7131017",
  "7131019",
  "7131020",
  "7131024",
  "7131025",
  "7131033",
  "7131045",
  "7132004"
)
```

```{r}
nonpersonnel_clean <-
  nonpersonnel |>
  mutate(is_capital = case_when(
    appropriation_fund == "3030" ~ TRUE,
    .default = FALSE
  )) |>
  mutate(is_service = when_all(
    str_detect(account_id, "^713[12]"),
    !(account_id %in% services_excluded)
  )) |>
  mutate(po_number = str_extract(
    transaction_id, regex("PO[:digit:]{6}", ignore_case = FALSE)
  )) |>
  mutate(is_po = !is.na(po_number), .before = po_number)
```

```{r}
# r051a_aug <-
#   r051a_clean |>
# left_join(pos_cat_prev, by = join_by(po_number)) |>
# mutate(is_grant = case_when(
#   award == "1000074" & project == "400308" ~ TRUE,
#   award != "1000074" & (award %in% grants$award_current) ~ TRUE,
#   award != "1000074" & (award %in% grants$award_carryover) ~ TRUE,
#   .default = FALSE
# ))
```

```{r}
nonpersonnel_clean |>
  write_parquet(glue("{path_data}/working/nonpersonnel_clean.parquet"))
nonpersonnel_clean |>
  write_csv(glue("{path_data}/working/nonpersonnel_clean.csv"), na = "")
```

Write out purchase orders for manual review.

```{r}
nonpersonnel_po <-
  nonpersonnel_clean |>
  filter(is_po, is_service)

po_costcenters <-
  nonpersonnel_po |>
  summarize(
    costcenter_names = str_flatten(
      sort(unique(costcenter_name)),
      collapse = "; "
    ),
    .by = po_number
  )

po_accounts <-
  nonpersonnel_po |>
  mutate(account_combo = str_c(account_id, " || ", account_name)) |>
  summarize(
    net_accounted = sum(net_accounted), .by = c(po_number, account_combo)
  ) |>
  filter(net_accounted != 0.00) |>
  pivot_wider(
    id_cols = po_number,
    names_from = account_combo, values_from = net_accounted, names_sort = TRUE
  ) |>
  rowwise() |>
  mutate(po_total = sum(c_across(starts_with("713")), na.rm = TRUE)) |>
  ungroup()

po_detail <-
  po_costcenters |>
  left_join(po_accounts, by = join_by(po_number)) |>
  left_join(po, by = join_by(po_number)) |>
  mutate(categorization = NA_character_) |>
  mutate(likely_not_excluded = str_detect(items, regex(
    "name (of )*(the )*resource|resource name",
    ignore_case = TRUE
  ))) |>
  relocate(
    c(
      categorization, likely_not_excluded,
      suppliers, items, title, costcenter_names, po_number, po_total
    ),
    .before = 0
  ) |>
  arrange(
    likely_not_excluded,
    suppliers, items, title, costcenter_names, po_number
  )

po_detail |> write_csv(glue("{path_data}/working/po_detail.csv"), na = "")
```

# Diagnostic

```{r}
Sys.time()
```
